text.title: Stakeholder Engagement (Advanced) Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Resistant to Neutral transition
example.note: IT Security Director blocking cloud migration. Week 1: 1:1 listen (document concerns, do not defend). Week 2: security requirements workshop (they co-author). Week 3: vendor cert review session. Week 4: joint sign-off on security AC. Evidence of success: written confirmation of Week 4 participation. Matrix updated; gap Resistant→Neutral closed.
